levels.name: Raw ingest
levels.description: Polar GDPR export. 11 distinct data sources from a single subject's wearable. Lives outside the repo as raw personal cardiac data is not committed.

levels.name: Structured extract
levels.description: Eight Pydantic-validated parsers. Heterogeneous JSON schemas in, typed pandas DataFrames out. Every drop logged with reason.

levels.name: Derived features
levels.description: Three feature computers. neurokit2 advanced HRV (SDNN, LF/HF, SD1, DFA-α1) on raw RR, daily zone aggregation, training session stratification.

levels.name: Unified daily frame
levels.description: Outer-merge of L1 and L2 across date. One row per day, NaN where source missing. The canonical L3 artifact.

levels.name: Joint with diary
levels.description: Inner merge with subjective symptom diary. Adds 4-lag temporal features (t0–t3) on autonomic columns.

levels.name: Model outputs
levels.description: Multi-target predictor. Forward selection per target, LOO-CV, bootstrap CI95×1000. Headline locked to autonomic dysfunction (deployment target).

levels.name: Portfolio render
levels.description: polar_live.json regenerated atomically and served at kineticaai.com via React runtime. SSR fallback first, hydration fills CI and features.
